# `legal` — legal templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates exploiting legal authority and fear of litigation

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Template details

### Legal Case Document Share

- **File:** [`case_document_sharing.html`](case_document_sharing.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 25-45%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/legal_education.html`](education/legal_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Legal notice: Case documents require your review
  - You have been named in a legal proceeding — documents attached
  - Urgent: Response required to avoid legal action
- **Operator notes:** Best for executives, managers, and legal/compliance staff. Legal threats are high-fear, low-click — but very effective for senior targets.

### DocuSign – NDA Awaiting Signature

- **File:** [`docusign_nda.html`](docusign_nda.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/legal_education.html`](education/legal_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Please DocuSign: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
  - You have a document to sign
  - Action required: signature requested on Mutual NDA
- **Operator notes:** The classic e-signature lure applied to legal. Very high credibility; deploy to legal, finance, and exec teams.

### Legal Hold – Acknowledgement Required

- **File:** [`legal_hold_notice.html`](legal_hold_notice.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/legal_education.html`](education/legal_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Legal hold notification - acknowledgement required
  - Action required: preservation of documents
  - Confidential: legal hold notice
- **Operator notes:** Authority + confidentiality drives compliance. Advanced: targets are reluctant to ignore a legal instruction.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
